ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Acura) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., TLX, ILX) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "engine_fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the engine (e.g., Petrol) */,
  "engine_hp" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "engine_cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "driven_wheels" TEXT /* Type of driven wheels (e.g., all wheel drive, front wheel drive) */,
  "number_of_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors in the vehicle */,
  "market_category" INTEGER /* Market category of the vehicle (e.g., E, C) */,
  "vehicle_size" INTEGER /* Size of the vehicle (e.g., Midsize, Compact) */,
  "vehicle_style" TEXT /* Style of the vehicle (e.g., Sedan) */,
  "city_kpl" REAL /* City kilometers per liter (fuel efficiency) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle in local currency */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., New, Used, Certified Pre-Owned) */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle's warranty expires */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was purchased by the dealership */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was purchased by the dealership */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from whom the vehicle was purchased */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle is featured in promotions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_size FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_size") REFERENCES vehicle_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_market_category FOREIGN KEY ("market_category") REFERENCES market_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who made the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the sale */,
  "financing_option" TEXT /* Type of financing option used by the customer (e.g., Cash, Lease, Financing) */,
  "trade_in_value" REAL /* Value of the trade-in vehicle, if applicable */,
  "trade_in_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade-in vehicle, if applicable */,
  "is_test_drive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sale was a result of a test drive */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., Online, In-Store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_reps ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trade_in_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_in_vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., Email, Phone) */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer first interacted with the dealership */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer on purchases */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reps" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the sales representative */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the sales representative was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the sales representative belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the sales representative */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the sales representative */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the sales representative (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sales representative is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reps_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES sales_reps ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved in the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., added, removed, updated) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the log entry */,
  "vehicle_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle at the time of the log entry */,
  "mileage_at_log" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the market category (e.g., E, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the market category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle size (e.g., Midsize, Compact) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle size is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)
